entry.title: New IDC FA863012D5018 awarded to S&K AEROSPACE, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADD PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE DATES TO BASE YEAR CLINS; ADD FAR CLAUSE 52.246-23 TO THE CONTRACT; UPDATE SECTION J, ATTACHMENTS 1, 6, 8, 9, 11; ADD SECTION J, ATTACHMENT 14.
